overall.description: A cinematic scene from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character camping by a river in a mountainous wilderness. The camera slowly orbits around the campsite featuring a canvas tent, campfire, and tethered horse, then transitions to wide panoramic views of the valley bathed in golden morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside campsite with canvas tent and cooking fire

agents.ego_description: crouching by the campfire, tending to the flames and adjusting the cooking grate with a stick

notable_agents.action: brown horse tethered near bushes behind the tent, standing still with occasional head movements

entered.detail: large beige canvas tent with wooden support poles
burning campfire with orange flames and rising smoke
metal cooking grate suspended over the fire
uneven rocky dirt ground with scattered stones and patches of grass
tall evergreen pine trees surrounding the campsite
large rock formation and boulders behind the tent

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits around a campsite where a cowboy character crouches by a crackling campfire. A canvas tent stands behind him with a horse tethered nearby, surrounded by pine trees and rocky terrain in the morning light.

events.description: character stands up from crouching position by the fire

agents.ego_description: standing by the campfire, tending to the cooking equipment while facing the river view

entered.detail: wide river flowing through the valley with rocky banks and gentle current

segments.scene_description: The character stands up from the fire as the camera shifts to reveal the river flowing through the valley behind him. The tent is now visible to the left while the river and distant mountains dominate the background view.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley overlook with forested slopes

events.description: camera pulls back to wide aerial view revealing the full river valley and surrounding mountains

agents.ego_description: standing small in frame by the distant campfire, overlooking the expansive valley

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks with forested slopes and rocky outcrops
bright sun low in the sky casting golden rays through morning mist

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back to a sweeping wide shot of the river valley, with the campsite now small in the center. The morning sun rises behind the mountains, backlighting the dense pine forests and illuminating the misty valley below.

events.description: character sits down by the campfire and begins drinking from a metal cup

agents.ego_description: sitting relaxed on the ground by the campfire, sipping from a cup and gazing out at the river

entered.detail: rocky terrain and boulders at the campsite edge

segments.scene_description: Returning to a closer view, the character sits by the now prominently visible campfire on the right, drinking from a cup. The canvas tent sits in the left background while the river flows peacefully in the mid-ground, framed by rocky cliffs and pine trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that orbits an intimate wilderness campsite before expanding into a sweeping panoramic view of a sunlit river valley. It begins by circling a cowboy crouching by a crackling campfire, with a canvas tent and a tethered horse nestled among pine trees and rocky terrain. As the character stands, the camera shifts its focus outward to reveal a river flowing through the valley, allowing the distant mountains to dominate the background. The scene then opens into a sweeping wide shot as the camera pulls back, capturing the morning sun rising behind the peaks to backlight the dense forests and illuminate the misty valley below. Finally, the perspective returns to a closer view of the campsite, framing the character drinking from a cup by the fire with the peaceful river and rocky cliffs stretching out in the mid-ground.
